observations.description: The project has a dual-architecture: a Bun CLI (Ink TUI) and a Tauri 2 desktop app (React+Vite+Zustand) that connects to the CLI's HTTP/WS server.
The server bridges CLI agent capabilities to the desktop frontend via 26 REST API routes and WebSocket session events.
IM adapters (Telegram, Feishu, WeChat, DingTalk) share a common library under adapters/common/ and depend on the server via tsconfig paths.
Agent-tools and agent-utils have critical coverage gaps (17.1% and 14.42% lines respectively) — the largest untested surface in the project.
5 server tests are quarantined due to timing instability: cron-scheduler, providers-real, tasks, e2e:business-flow, e2e:full-flow.
MCP, OAuth, and plugin systems are the highest-risk external trust boundaries — they handle third-party code execution, credential management, and hot-reloaded plugin code.
Permission system spans 27 files across filesystem, shell, and approval sub-systems with auto-mode and YOLO classifier prompting — a sensitive security boundary.
Doctor repair is deny-by-default for persistence mutations, protecting transcripts, config, OAuth tokens, and team/session records.
Recent git history shows Desktop UI/UX (36 commits) as the most active area, followed by Memory/Projects (19), Goals/Agent Loop (18), and Settings/Zoom (15).
Volatility hotspots include ActiveSession.tsx (11 changes), MessageList.tsx (9), zh.ts/en.ts i18n (7 each), chatStore.ts (6), goalState.ts (6), teamStore.ts (6 new area).
Desktop state management uses 22 Zustand stores — chatStore (1728 lines) is the largest, followed by sessionStore, uiStore, settingsStore, providerStore.
The agent tool ecosystem has 59+ tools organized in individual directories under src/tools/, registered through src/tools.ts.

21 capabilities identified across CLI, desktop, tools, services, and adapters — TUI, Desktop, Commands, Agent, Skills, Memory, MCP, LSP, Tools, Models, Computer Use, IM, Worktree, Teams, Plan, Voice, H5, Plugins, Quality Gate, Auth, Doctor.
The quality gate system supports 3 modes (pr/baseline/release) with enforcement across provider-smoke, desktop-smoke, coverage, quarantine, and persistence-upgrade.
Bun is the primary runtime with npm used only for docs build (VitePress requires npm ci). Cargo builds the Tauri native layer.
Exact import graph within src/utils/ (346 modules) was not analyzed — dependency edges here are inferred from directory structure and partial reads.
Specific API route mapping between desktop/src/api/ and src/server/api/ was not exhaustively validated — route paths are inferred from filename conventions.
